x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Performance Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures the partners ability to deliver services efficiently, reliably, and within agreed service levels.

Focus Areas:
System uptime
Transaction processing time
Error rate
Turnaround time (TAT)
Service availability

Comment:
Example KPIs:
99.9% API availability
Loan approval turnaround within 48 hours

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Performance Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures the financial contribution and commercial outcomes of the partner relationship.

Focus Areas:
Revenue targets
Sales volumes
Profitability margins
Cost efficiency
Commission accuracy

Comment:
Example KPIs:
Monthly sales target of 1,000 accounts
Minimum profitability margin of 15%

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Performance Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures the partners adherence to regulatory, legal, and internal policy requirements.

Focus Areas:
AML/KYC compliance rate
Regulatory reporting timeliness
Audit findings
Data protection adherence

Comment:
Example KPIs:
100% KYC validation before onboarding
Zero critical audit findings

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Performance Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures the partners risk management effectiveness and exposure control.

Focus Areas:
Fraud rate
Operational risk incidents
Security breaches
Credit default rates (if applicable)

Comment:
Example KPIs:
Fraud rate below 0.5%
Zero major cybersecurity incidents

x-enumeration-literals.name: Strategic Performance Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures the partners contribution to long-term strategic objectives.

Focus Areas:
Market expansion
Innovation initiatives
Customer acquisition growth
Digital transformation contribution

Comment
Example KPIs:
20% increase in digital customer base
Successful launch of new co-branded product

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Experience Performance Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures the quality of customer interaction and satisfaction delivered by the partner.

Focus Areas:
Customer satisfaction (CSAT)
Net Promoter Score (NPS)
Complaint resolution time
First-contact resolution rate

Comment:
Example KPIs:
NPS above 60
95% complaints resolved within 3 days
